untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 52-week high calculation (252-bar lookback high), which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The closest available indicator is price_pos_20 (20-bar position), but this does not capture the 52-week (252-day) high differential required by the original rule. Additionally, the confirmation requirement ('closed above threshold on 2 of last 3 days') cannot be expressed with the allowed operators without bar indexing.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using price_pos_20 as a proximity measure, but this is fundamentally insufficient. A proper implementation requires either: (1) a 52_week_high indicator, or (2) dc_upper with a 252-bar period specification (not supported). The signal is context-dependent (works in trending regimes) but CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction was mapped to LONG as the most reasonable interpretation.
